name: ClawDrill
description: A massive, 90-meter-long drill operated by Red Helldivers.
mechanics: Requires a DC 20 Dexterity check for non-Helldivers to pilot.

name: GravBoots
description: Advanced anti-gravity footwear primarily used by Golds.
mechanics: Allows flight speed of 60 ft.

name: Razor
description: The signature weapon of the Gold Color. Transitions between whip and blade.
mechanics: Whip form has 10 ft reach, bonus action grapple. Illegal for non-Golds.

name: PulseFist
description: A gauntlet-mounted energy weapon.
mechanics: Stun (DC 15 CON save) or Kill (2d10 radiant damage).

name: PulseArmor
description: High-tech combat armor with a built-in PulseShield.
mechanics: Base AC 17. Shield absorbs first 20 points of damage per encounter.

name: Forged Sigil
description: A surgical implant spoofing BoQC scanners.
mechanics: Passes standard commercial manifest scans. Fails deep-scans.

name: Scorcher
description: Standard-issue energy sidearm.
mechanics: Ranged weapon (30/120 ft), 1d8 radiant damage.

name: WhisperCrystal
description: Translucent crystal encoded with a single-use voice message.
mechanics: Plays once at a whisper volume, then dissolves into dust.

name: IonBlade
description: An energy sword favored by highColors who cannot wield a Razor.
mechanics: Deals 1d8 slashing + 1d4 lightning damage.

name: SlingBlade
description: A curved, sickle-like Helldiver tool repurposed as a weapon.
mechanics: Deals 1d6 slashing damage. Symbol of Red rebellion.

name: StarShell
description: A 4-meter tall orbital drop mech suit used for Iron Rains.
mechanics: Grants immense strength and heavy weapons, but requires Gold-level training to pilot.

name: GhostCloak
description: Personal active camouflage device.
mechanics: Grants advantage on Stealth checks. Deactivates if the wearer attacks.

name: Recather
description: Advanced medical device for rapid cellular healing.
mechanics: Heals 4d8 HP over 1 minute. Highly illegal for lowColors.

name: Pitviper Venom
description: Deadly neurotoxin extracted from Martian pitvipers.
mechanics: DC 17 CON save. Failure causes paralysis and 3d10 poison damage.

name: Haemanthus Extract
description: Derivative of the Martian flower, used to induce a death-like coma.
mechanics: Target appears dead to basic medical scans for 24 hours.

name: Datadrop
description: Encrypted data storage drive used by Greens and the Syndicate.
mechanics: Requires Green tools to decrypt (DC 18 Intelligence).

name: Aegis
description: Heavy energy shield carried by elite Gray Lurchers.
mechanics: Provides +3 AC and resistance to energy attacks when deployed.

name: Stun Baton
description: Riot control weapon used by the Gray garrison.
mechanics: Deals 1d4 bludgeoning + 1d4 lightning. Target must make a DC 13 CON save or be stunned for 1 round.

name: RipWing
description: Small, agile atmospheric and void fighter craft.
mechanics: Armed with light scorchers and pulse missiles. Used for patrol and dogfighting.

name: TorchShip
description: Mid-to-large interplanetary transport and warship.
mechanics: Primary mode of transit between spheres. Navigated strictly by Blues.

name: LeechCraft
description: Stealth boarding pod designed to pierce ship hulls.
mechanics: Used by Obsidians, Grays, and the Sons for hostile ship takeovers.

name: EMP Grenade
description: Standard explosive for disabling PulseArmor and electronics.
mechanics: Disables PulseShields and electronic devices in a 20ft radius for 1 minute.

name: Stim-tab
description: Adrenaline stimulant used by Grays and lowColors for double-shifts.
mechanics: Removes exhaustion for 4 hours, but causes 1 level of exhaustion when it wears off.

name: Obsidian Ice-Axe
description: Primitive but devastating melee weapon favored by Stained.
mechanics: Deals 1d10 slashing/bludgeoning damage. Brutal criticals.

name: Aegis Gauntlet
description: A forearm-mounted energy shield used by Golds. Excellent for parrying kinetic and energy weapons in close quarters.
mechanics: Grants +2 to AC against melee and ranged attacks. Can perform a shield bash as a bonus action.

name: Omnivore Railgun Pistol
description: A specialized Black Market sidearm that uses an internal micro-forge to melt and shape any scrap metal into lethal projectiles on the fly.
mechanics: Ammunition can be created from any metallic object. Ignores resistance to kinetic damage.

name: Zoladone Injector
description: A powerful chemical agent used by Peerless Scarred and inquisitors to completely strip away empathy, fear, and pain.
mechanics: Advantage on saving throws against fear and charm effects for 1 hour. Disadvantage on all Charisma checks.

name: Snake Bite (Oil Change)
description: An extreme military stimulant cocktail used by elite Gray commandos to push far beyond human limits, with severe crashes.
mechanics: Grants Haste for 1 minute. Afterwards, user suffers 2 levels of exhaustion.

name: Obsidian Spirit Berries
description: A potent hallucinogen from the poles of Mars, used by Obsidians to commune with the gods or induce berserker trances.
mechanics: User gains resistance to bludgeoning damage but must attack the nearest creature each turn for 1 minute.

name: Tabula Rasa Chair
description: A highly illegal mind-wiping technology utilized by deep-state Gold operatives to erase or rewrite an individual's memories.
mechanics: Can fully rewrite a target's memories over 8 hours. Target must fail a DC 22 Wisdom save.

name: Learning Accelerant Drip
description: Intravenous chemicals used during Gold carving processes to allow the brain to absorb years of education in weeks.
mechanics: Halves the time required to learn a new skill or language during downtime.

name: Gold Star Shell
description: A localized spacecraft and powered armor used by Peerless Scarred for devastating Iron Rain orbital drops.
mechanics: Grants AC 20, a flying speed of 60 ft, and immunity to extreme environments.

name: Peerless GravBoots
description: Standard issue anti-gravity footwear for high-ranking Society members. Completely forbidden for lowColors.
mechanics: Allows hovering up to 30 feet and negates falling damage.

name: Lykos SlingBlade
description: A curved, hooked implement used by Red miners for harvesting Helium-3. Though a tool, it is lethal in desperate hands.
mechanics: 1d6 slashing damage. On a critical hit, the target is grappled or tripped.

name: Helium-3 Sonic Drill
description: Heavy industrial mining equipment from the deep mines of Mars. Emits a deafening sonic pulse to fracture rock.
mechanics: Can bore through 5 feet of solid rock per minute. Can be improvised as a weapon dealing 2d8 thunder damage.

name: Stained PulseAxe
description: A massive kinetic weapon designed specifically for the enormous, genetically enhanced Obsidian warriors.
mechanics: 2d12 slashing damage. Requires Strength 18 to wield effectively. On a hit, emits a shockwave pushing the target 5 feet.

name: Drachenjäger
description: A colossal, bipedal mech walker designed for devastating ground assaults and carrying wound-healing armor.
mechanics: Acts as a gargantuan vehicle. Equipped with heavy railguns and plasma cannons.

name: Lovelock Engine
description: Originally a terraforming device, these massive orbital engines can be weaponized to manipulate weather patterns.
mechanics: Can create localized storms, tornadoes, or extreme temperature shifts over a 10-mile radius.

name: Shadow Fleet Transponder
description: An illegal ship module used by Jackals and smugglers to mimic the signatures of destroyed or decommissioned Society ships.
mechanics: Grants advantage on checks made to bypass Society blockades and deep-space patrols.

name: Iron Rain Spit Tube
description: A high-velocity single-occupant insertion pod launched from capital ships to punch through planetary defenses.
mechanics: Carries one occupant to the surface at Mach speeds. Imposes a DC 15 Constitution save to avoid stunning on impact.

name: Volarus Griffin Amulet
description: A carved bone trinket belonging to the royal Obsidian line, broken as a pact when the Valkyrie sold their sons to the Golds.
mechanics: Grants advantage on Persuasion or Intimidation checks against Obsidians of the Spires.

name: Master of the Sun Razor
description: The pinnacle of pre-Rising metallurgy. A chemical-tempered whip that can instantly harden into an unbreakable blade.
mechanics: 1d8 slashing damage. As a bonus action, changes from a 10-foot reach whip to a longsword. Scores a critical hit on a 19 or 20.

name: Peerless Razor
description: The elegant, shapeshifting weapon of the Gold caste, capable of shifting from a solid blade to a flexible whip.
mechanics: Ignores standard armor when in whip form; deals severe slashing damage.

name: Lurcher Scorcher
description: A high-powered thermal projectile weapon favored by Gray Lurchers for breaching and close-quarters combat.
mechanics: Deals high thermal damage; chance to set target on fire; ignores light cover.

name: Aegis Shield
description: A directional energy shield worn on the forearm, capable of deflecting pulse blasts and razor strikes.
mechanics: Provides temporary invulnerability from one direction; overheats under sustained fire.

name: PulseFist
description: A heavy gauntlet emitting concentrated sonic and concussive blasts, typically mounted on Starshells or heavy infantry.
mechanics: Deals massive concussive damage; knocks back enemies; slow rate of fire.

name: GhostCloak
description: A sophisticated piece of optical camouflage that bends light around the wearer, rendering them nearly invisible.
mechanics: Grants invisibility while stationary or moving slowly; disrupted by taking damage.

name: Obsidian IonBlade
description: A heavy, brutal sword forged for Obsidians, surrounded by an energized ion field to cleave through armor.
mechanics: High slashing and shock damage; effective against shields.

name: Praetorian Scutum
description: A heavy, deployable blast shield used by Gray legions to form impregnable phalanxes.
mechanics: Provides full frontal cover; restricts movement speed when deployed.

name: Modified Mining Laser
description: A heavy rock-cutting laser illicitly modified by lowColors for defensive or rebellious purposes.
mechanics: High armor-piercing damage; dangerous to user; short range.

name: Stained Berserker Axe
description: A massive, two-handed axe wielded by Obsidian Stained, often etched with tribal runes and dried blood.
mechanics: Devastating critical hits; requires high strength to wield effectively.

name: Copper Stun Baton
description: A standard-issue pacification tool used by coppers and peacekeepers to subdue unruly lowColors without lethal force.
mechanics: Deals non-lethal shock damage; can paralyze targets on a critical hit.

name: Pitviper Venom Knife
description: A crude bone or steel shank coated in synthesized or harvested Pitviper venom, popular in the deep mines.
mechanics: Low physical damage; applies a lethal, fast-acting poison over time.

name: Starshell
description: Massive mechanized infantry armor used by Golds and elite Grays, turning the wearer into a walking tank.
mechanics: Provides massive damage resistance and strength; vulnerable to EMPs.

name: SlingBlade
description: A razor modified to lock in the shape of a farmer's sickle, a brutally effective and symbolic weapon.
mechanics: High hooking and disarming capability; ignores standard parries.

name: PulseShield
description: A personal energy barrier that absorbs incoming kinetic and thermal energy before collapsing.
mechanics: Grants temporary hit points; recharges after a period of avoiding damage.

name: Rim-Pattern Plasma Rifle
description: A sleek, highly accurate energy weapon manufactured in the Rim Worlds, known for its chilling efficiency.
mechanics: High accuracy and range; deals plasma damage; requires specialized ammo.

name: Violet-Crafted Sonic Emitter
description: An artisanal, concealed device that emits a targeted sonic frequency capable of rupturing organs.
mechanics: Ignores physical armor; causes internal bleeding; short range.

name: Bellona Dueling Razor
description: An exceptionally long and perfectly balanced razor, forged by master Carvers for House Bellona's blademasters.
mechanics: Grants a bonus to parrying and striking speed in single combat.

name: GravBoots
description: Standard Gold military footwear that manipulates localized gravity, allowing for flight and rapid drops.
mechanics: Grants flight and hovering capabilities; increases movement speed.

name: Gorgon Combat Knife
description: A serrated, matte-black survival knife favored by the Ash Lord's elite Gorgons for silent kills.
mechanics: Deals bonus damage when attacking from stealth; non-reflective surface.

name: Pink Assassin's Needle
description: A microscopic, spring-loaded needle concealed in jewelry or clothing, carrying a lethal neurotoxin.
mechanics: Deals negligible physical damage; instant kill if target fails a resistance check.

name: Deep-Mine Demo-Charge
description: Improvised explosives packed into drill-casings, used by Reds for sabotage.
mechanics: Deals massive area-of-effect damage; unstable and unpredictable.

name: Telemanus Power Gauntlets
description: Oversized, hydraulically assisted gauntlets worn by giants of House Telemanus to crush armor and bone.
mechanics: Massive blunt force damage; can shatter walls and shields.

name: House Mars Praetor Scorcher
description: A customized, heavy-duty scorcher with an underslung pulse-shotgun, used by Mars commanders.
mechanics: Versatile range options; high recoil; intimidating presence.

name: Grays' Breaching Charge
description: A shaped charge designed to blow through starship bulkheads or heavy security doors.
mechanics: Destroys environmental barriers; stuns enemies caught in the blast radius.

name: Votum-Pattern PulseCarbine
description: A lightweight, high-capacity energy weapon favored for ship-boarding actions and close quarters.
mechanics: High rate of fire; lower damage per shot; excellent for suppressing fire.

name: Sovereign's Aegis
description: A masterwork personal shield generator built directly into formal attire, used by the Sovereign.
mechanics: Provides an incredibly resilient barrier that is nearly invisible until struck.

name: Ash Lord's Thermic Razor
description: A terrifying razor variant that burns at incredible temperatures, cauterizing wounds as it severs limbs.
mechanics: Deals additional fire damage; prevents target from healing or regenerating.

name: Dustwalker Sniper Rifle
description: A projectile weapon used by elite Gray snipers, firing depleted uranium slugs across vast distances.
mechanics: Extreme range and armor penetration; requires a setup phase to fire accurately.

name: Recoil-Absorbing Suit
description: A form-fitting undersuit worn beneath heavier armor to distribute kinetic impacts and prevent internal trauma.
mechanics: Reduces blunt and concussive damage; lightweight and flexible.

name: LowColor Ripper Shanks
description: Crudely sharpened pieces of machinery or scrap metal, used in gang wars and prison riots.
mechanics: Low durability; high chance to inflict bleeding wounds.

name: Furies' Whip
description: A specialized razor used by the Sovereign's Furies, laced with neuro-electric shock emitters.
mechanics: Deals electrical damage; can stun or paralyze targets on a hit.

name: Iron Gold Antique Cuirass
description: Ancient, incredibly heavy armor from the Conquering, offering unparalleled physical protection at the cost of speed.
mechanics: Immune to light arms fire; severely reduces mobility.

name: Society Peacekeeper Net-Gun
description: A riot-control weapon that fires an expanding, electrified mesh to capture targets alive.
mechanics: Restrains target and deals continuous low shock damage.

name: Obsidian Bone-Bow
description: A massive bow carved from the bones of monstrous beasts, firing heavy, armor-piercing arrows.
mechanics: Silent and deadly; requires extreme strength to draw.

name: Sunblood Heavy Razor
description: A thicker, more rigid razor design favored by House Augustus for brutal, cleaving strikes over finesse.
mechanics: Lower parry chance; higher base damage; can break lighter weapons.

name: Drachenjäger PulseLance
description: A hybrid weapon used by mech pilots, capable of discharging a massive energy blast or being used as a spear.
mechanics: High burst damage; requires a cooldown after firing a pulse.

name: Gold Dueling Shield
description: A small, elegant buckler used in formal duels to parry razor strikes without relying entirely on an Aegis.
mechanics: Increases parry capability; offers minimal protection against ranged attacks.

name: Stygian PulseRifle
description: A rapid-fire energy weapon used by elite boarding parties, specialized for zero-G combat without recoil.
mechanics: No recoil in zero-G environments; reliable in a vacuum.

name: Arcosian Dueling Razor
description: A minimalist razor design stripped of ornamental weight, maximizing speed and lethality in the hands of a master.
mechanics: Increases attack speed and critical strike chance; fragile against heavy weapons.

name: Olympus Knight's Morning Star
description: A brutal razor variant that locks into a spiked mace head, used by the Olympic Knights for crushing armor.
mechanics: High armor penetration; slow swing speed; difficult to parry.

name: Razor
description: A deadly whip-sword that can instantly switch between a rigid blade and a flexible whip, capable of cutting through nearly any material.
mechanics: +3 Melee Combat, ignores standard armor

name: GravBoot
description: Standard issue footwear for Golds and high-tier military, allowing flight and hovering.
mechanics: Grants flight movement

name: PulseShield
description: A personal energy shield that deflects fast-moving projectiles and energy blasts but can be bypassed by slow-moving objects like a Razor.
mechanics: Provides 50 THP against ranged attacks

name: Stims
description: Adrenaline-based injection that temporarily increases reflexes and strength but causes a severe crash afterward.
mechanics: +2 Action Points for 3 turns, then -1 AP for 1 hour

name: Burn
description: A potent recreational narcotic popular among lower Colors that numbs pain and induces a euphoric state.
mechanics: Removes pain penalties, causes addiction

name: Slicing Deck
description: A portable terminal used by hackers to bypass electronic locks and override basic security systems.
mechanics: +3 Hacking, can unlock Restricted doors

name: Datapad
description: A common tablet device used for communication, data storage, and entertainment.
mechanics: Stores and transmits data

name: Ion Pistol
description: A standard energy sidearm that fires charged particle blasts, effective against unarmored targets and light shields.
mechanics: 1d8 Energy Damage

name: PulseFist
description: A gauntlet equipped with a localized gravity emitter, capable of delivering devastating concussive blows.
mechanics: 1d10 Blunt Damage, knockback effect

name: Stealth Cloak
description: A specialized cloak that bends light around the wearer, rendering them nearly invisible.
mechanics: Advantage on Stealth checks

name: GhostCloak
description: An illegal variant of the Stealth Cloak that also masks thermal and electromagnetic signatures.
mechanics: +5 Stealth, evades sensor scans

name: Med-Gel
description: A rapidly expanding bio-gel that seals wounds, prevents blood loss, and accelerates healing.
mechanics: Heals 2d6 HP, stops bleeding

name: RipWing
description: A fast, agile single-seat fighter spacecraft used primarily by Gold pilots for dogfighting and escort missions.
mechanics: Speed 8, heavily armed

name: TorchShip
description: A versatile transport vessel capable of atmospheric entry and interplanetary travel.
mechanics: Carries 20 passengers or cargo

name: Dreadnought
description: A massive capital ship serving as the backbone of the Society's fleet, bristling with weaponry and carrying thousands of troops.
mechanics: Heavy armor, massive firepower

name: Scorcher
description: A heavy energy weapon that fires a continuous beam of superheated plasma, melting through armor.
mechanics: 2d10 Fire Damage, melts cover

name: SlingBand
description: A wrist-mounted device that fires micro-projectiles at high velocity.
mechanics: 1d6 Piercing Damage, silent

name: Sonar Goggles
description: Eyewear that uses echolocation to map the environment, allowing the user to 'see' through walls and in complete darkness.
mechanics: Grants Tremorsense 60ft

name: Tracker Bug
description: A tiny, adhesive device that transmits its location to a paired receiver.
mechanics: Tracks target location

name: EMP Grenade
description: An explosive device that releases a burst of electromagnetic energy, disabling nearby electronic devices and shields.
mechanics: Disables electronics in 20ft radius for 1d4 turns

name: Breaching Charge
description: A shaped explosive designed to blow through reinforced doors and bulkheads.
mechanics: Destroys barriers, loud

name: Truth Serum
description: A chemical compound used in interrogations to force the subject to answer questions honestly.
mechanics: Target fails deception checks

name: Memory Wiper
description: A device used to selectively erase recent memories, often employed by the Board of Quality Control.
mechanics: Erases up to 24 hours of memory

name: Kinetic Shield
description: A stationary shield generator that creates a large protective dome against physical and energy attacks.
mechanics: Creates a 30ft radius shield with 200 HP

name: ComLink
description: A small, earpiece communication device for short to medium-range radio contact.
mechanics: Communication within 5 miles

name: Oxygen Mask
description: A portable breathing apparatus that filters toxic air or provides oxygen in a vacuum.
mechanics: Grants breathing in hostile environments

name: Grapple Gun
description: A handheld device that fires a retractable hook and cable, used for climbing and swinging.
mechanics: Grants climbing speed

name: Holo-Projector
description: A device that creates realistic 3D holographic illusions.
mechanics: Creates visual illusions

name: Repair Drone
description: A small, automated drone programmed to fix mechanical and electronic systems.
mechanics: Fixes machinery, +2 Repair checks

name: Security Override Key
description: A highly illegal master key capable of unlocking high-security doors and vaults.
mechanics: Unlocks any door, single use

name: Poison Dart
description: A small dart coated in a lethal neurotoxin, usually fired from a silent blowpipe or modified SlingBand.
mechanics: 1d4 Piercing + 2d8 Poison Damage, requires Constitution save

name: Flashbang Grenade
description: A non-lethal explosive that produces a blinding flash of light and a deafening bang.
mechanics: Blinds and deafens targets in 15ft radius

name: Riot Shield
description: A heavy, transparent shield used by Grays for crowd control.
mechanics: +2 AC, provides half cover

name: Stun Baton
description: A melee weapon that delivers a powerful electric shock, used for pacification.
mechanics: 1d6 Bludgeoning + 1d4 Lightning, chance to stun

name: Thermal Detonator
description: A highly explosive grenade that unleashes a blast of pure thermal energy.
mechanics: 3d10 Fire Damage in 20ft radius

name: Cryo-Pod
description: A stasis chamber used to suspend a person's biological functions, allowing them to survive long journeys or severe injuries.
mechanics: Halts aging and dying conditions

name: Anti-Grav Lifter
description: A hovering platform used for transporting heavy cargo.
mechanics: Carries up to 2 tons

name: Laser Cutter
description: A portable tool that uses a concentrated laser beam to cut through metal and composite materials.
mechanics: Cuts through materials, 1d6 Fire Damage

name: Bio-Scanner
description: A handheld device that analyzes biological matter, identifying species, toxins, and medical conditions.
mechanics: +3 Medicine checks, identifies organics

name: StarShell
description: A heavy mechanized armor suit used by Gold commanders to dominate the battlefield.
mechanics: +5 AC, +4 Strength, flight capability, heavy weapons mount

name: Viper Variant PulseFist
description: A compact, high-yield PulseFist favored by Peerless Scarred for close-quarters ship boarding. Overheats rapidly but delivers devastating kinetic force.
mechanics: Range: Close. Damage: High. Overheats on consecutive attacks.

name: Modded "Ripper" SlingBlade
description: An illegally modified slingblade with a mono-molecular edge and a hidden scorcher cell in the hilt for a surprise blast.
mechanics: Adds +1d6 energy damage on first strike. Excellent for parrying.

name: Gray "Ghost" Stalker Armor
description: Matte-black recon armor used by elite Gray sniper teams. Integrates basic optical camouflage that disrupts thermal and visual tracking.
mechanics: Grants advantage on stealth checks. Reduces incoming energy damage slightly.

name: Obsidian "Icebreaker" Maul
description: A massive, blunt-force weapon forged from reinforced durasteel, designed to shatter Aegis shields and crush armor in a single blow.
mechanics: Ignores standard personal shields. Requires high strength to wield (Heavy).

name: Sunburst Experimental Aegis
description: A prototype personal shield that absorbs incoming energy fire and can release it in a blinding omnidirectional flash.
mechanics: Can be overloaded to blind enemies within 10m, disabling the shield for 3 turns.

name: Whisper Needle Pistol
description: A suppressed kinetic pistol that fires micro-flechettes coated in pitviper venom. Popular among Pink assassins and Syndicate operatives.
mechanics: Range: Medium. Damage: Low. Inflicts poison (damage over time). Silent.

name: Modded Ion-Burner Rifle
description: A standard Gray infantry rifle heavily modified to fire concentrated ionizing blasts, crippling unshielded electronics and frying nervous systems.
mechanics: Deals bonus damage against robotic targets and powered armor. High recoil.

name: Gorgon Stun Baton
description: A high-voltage baton used by Copper magistrates' bodyguards. Delivers a neuro-paralytic shock that bypasses basic armor.
mechanics: On successful hit, target must pass a fortitude save or be paralyzed for 1 turn.

name: Lurcher's "Breach" Charges
description: Shaped explosive charges used by Gray Lurchers to blow open blast doors. Highly unstable but incredibly effective.
mechanics: Destroys reinforced obstacles. High area-of-effect damage in confined spaces.

name: Blood-Eagle Razor Variant
description: A customized razor with serrated, interlocking segments that cause horrific bleeding wounds when retracted while embedded in a target.
mechanics: Inflicts severe bleeding effect on a critical hit. Difficult to master.

name: Obsidian "Snowblind" Goggles
description: Tactical eyewear worn by Obsidian snipers, filtering out glare and enhancing thermal signatures in blizzard conditions.
mechanics: Negates visual penalties from weather or flashbangs. Highlights heat signatures.

name: Hellfire Incendiary Grenade
description: An illegal area-denial weapon that detonates and spreads a sticky, burning substance that burns even in a vacuum.
mechanics: Area effect. Lingering fire damage for 3 turns. Cannot be extinguished with water.

name: Syndicate "Shade" Cloak
description: A lightweight cloak woven with light-bending metamaterials, purchased on the black market. Imperfect but highly effective in shadows.
mechanics: Grants invisibility when stationary in dim light or darkness.

name: Widowmaker Heavy Scorcher
description: An oversized, shoulder-mounted scorcher meant for mounting on mechs, illegally modified for infantry use by heavily augmented Grays.
mechanics: Range: Long. Damage: Extreme. Requires setup time to fire accurately. Heavy.

name: Aegis-Breaker EMP Emitter
description: A localized, single-use EMP device designed to strip the personal shields off Peerless Scarred during an ambush.
mechanics: Disables personal shields within a 5m radius for 2 turns. Destroys the emitter.

name: Kraken Boarding Harpoon
description: A pneumatic speargun used in zero-g boarding actions. The spear is tethered to a high-tensile wire and electrified.
mechanics: Can reel in targets or act as a zipline. Electrifies the target on impact.

name: Modified "Buzzsaw" Drone
description: A civilian utility drone retrofitted with monomolecular cutting blades and a rudimentary attack heuristic.
mechanics: Autonomous. Low health. Deals persistent slashing damage until destroyed.

name: Death's Head Obsidian Mask
description: A terrifying, reinforced helm worn by Obsidian chieftains, integrating a rudimentary life-support system and intimidation amplifiers.
mechanics: Grants advantage on intimidation. Provides 1 hour of breathable air in vacuum.

name: Eclipse Phase-Shift Armor
description: Highly experimental Gold armor that allows the wearer to briefly become intangible, passing through solid matter or avoiding attacks.
mechanics: Can phase shift once per combat for 1 turn. Severe energy drain on use.

name: Jackal's Tooth Combat Knife
description: A jagged, obsidian-glass combat knife favored by ruthless operatives. The blade is designed to snap off inside a wound.
mechanics: If a critical hit is scored, the blade breaks, dealing massive internal damage but ruining the weapon.

name: Valkyrie Jump-Pack
description: A high-velocity, short-burst jump pack used by Gold dragoons for rapid vertical assaults and orbital drops.
mechanics: Allows for massive leaps or brief controlled flight. Highly maneuverable.

name: Shatterglass Sonic Pistol
description: Fires concentrated waves of sound that resonate with and shatter rigid materials like bone, glass, and certain armors.
mechanics: Bypasses energy shields. Bonus damage against unarmored or rigid targets. Silent to the ear.

name: Modded "Scrap-Cannon"
description: A crude but devastating shotgun cobbled together by Red miners, firing a spread of industrial slag and heated metal shards.
mechanics: Range: Very Close. Damage: Devastating. High chance to misfire or jam.

name: Goliath Power Gauntlet
description: A heavily armored, pneumatically driven gauntlet designed for industrial loading but weaponized by low-Colors.
mechanics: Grants massive strength bonus to unarmed strikes. Slow to swing.

name: Wraith Sensor Baffler
description: A discrete belt-mounted device that emits false biometric readings and scrambles localized tracking sensors.
mechanics: Confuses automated turrets and tracking systems for a short duration.

name: Sun-Spear Energy Lance
description: A polearm that projects a cohesive beam of superheated plasma. Used ceremonially by Gold elites but fully functional in combat.
mechanics: Reach weapon. High armor penetration. Can be thrown as a javelin for massive damage.

name: Cinder Dust-Bomb
description: A grenade that releases a cloud of highly abrasive, electrified dust, clogging air filters and shorting out exposed circuits.
mechanics: Area effect. Blinds targets and disables energy weapons for 1 turn.

name: Stonewall Riot Shield
description: A heavy, transparent plasteel shield used by Gray Enforcers. Equipped with a stun-strip along the edge.
mechanics: Provides heavy cover. Bashing an enemy attempts a stun effect.

name: Silverskin Nano-Mesh
description: An incredibly thin, flexible mesh worn under normal clothing. Hardens instantly upon kinetic impact.
mechanics: Concealed armor. Excellent against kinetic weapons, poor against energy weapons.

name: Modded "Ghost-Link" Comms
description: A hacked, military-grade communication relay that allows encrypted, untraceable communication across the system.
mechanics: Cannot be intercepted by standard monitoring. Requires rare power cells.

name: Blood-Letter Syringe Pistol
description: A dart gun modified to fire large, reinforced syringes capable of penetrating armor to deliver toxins or experimental stimulants.
mechanics: Can be loaded with various alchemical compounds. Low physical damage.

name: Titan Breaching Hammer
description: A massive, two-handed hammer with a shaped-charge head, used for destroying fortified bunkers.
mechanics: On impact, triggers a localized explosion. Heavy and requires immense strength.

name: Null-Field Generator
description: A deployable device that creates a zone where energy weapons and personal shields cannot function.
mechanics: Affects friend and foe equally within a 15m radius. Requires a large power source.

name: Wasp Micro-Missile Launcher
description: A wrist-mounted launcher that fires a swarm of miniature, heat-seeking projectiles.
mechanics: Fires 3-5 missiles per volley. Low damage per missile, but tracks moving targets.

name: Ironclad Exosuit Frame
description: A stripped-down, industrial exoskeleton repurposed for combat, offering enhanced strength and armor plating at the cost of speed.
mechanics: Reduces movement speed. Significantly increases carrying capacity and melee damage.

name: Pulse-Wave Disruptor
description: A heavy weapon that fires a wide, slow-moving wave of pure kinetic force, knocking down enemies and deflecting projectiles.
mechanics: Area effect. Pushes targets back and has a chance to prone them. Low direct damage.

name: Viper's Kiss Monofilament Whip
description: A nearly invisible, infinitely sharp whip capable of slicing through armor and bone with ease. Extremely dangerous to the user.
mechanics: Requires extreme dexterity to use. High chance of self-injury on a critical failure. Ignores armor.

name: Aegis-Wall Deployable Cover
description: A portable device that projects a wide, stationary energy barrier, capable of stopping heavy weapons fire for a limited time.
mechanics: Provides temporary hard cover for a squad. Collapses after taking threshold damage.

name: Scavenger's Plasma Cutter
description: A heavy-duty industrial tool modified to project a short, intense blade of plasma. Excellent for breaching hulls or close-quarters desperation.
mechanics: Extremely short range. Devastating damage. Slow attack speed.

name: Shadow-Step Boots
description: Footwear equipped with sound-dampening fields and micro-repulsors, allowing the wearer to move silently and leave no tracks.
mechanics: Grants advantage on stealth and tracking-avoidance checks. Requires frequent recalibration.

name: Aegis Shield
description: Standard Gold energy shielding used to block high-velocity projectiles and physical attacks.
mechanics: Absorbs up to 20 damage before shorting out. Recharges over 1 hour.

name: Starshell
description: Massive mechanized combat armor wielded by Golds in zero-g and heavy combat.
mechanics: Grants +10 Armor, flight capabilities, and mounts heavy weaponry. Requires special training.

name: LeechCraft
description: A stealthy, tick-like boarding vessel used to latch onto larger ships and cut through their hulls without triggering alarms.
mechanics: Provides advantage on boarding actions; visually undetectable until within 1000km.

name: RipWing
description: Atmospheric and orbital dogfighter piloted primarily by Golds and specialized Grays.
mechanics: High maneuverability, twin pulse cannons, fragile hull.

name: TorchShip
description: A massive fleet carrier and dreadnought used by the Society armada to enforce the Pax Solaris.
mechanics: Mounts orbital bombardment cannons and carries squadrons of RipWings.

name: Helldiver ClawDrill
description: A heavy, two-handed drill unit used by Reds in the deep mines of Mars to crack helium-3 pockets.
mechanics: Deals extreme damage to structures; awkward to use in combat. Generates massive heat.

name: Pitviper Venom
description: Synthesized extract from Martian pitvipers; causes rapid necrosis and muscle spasms.
mechanics: Target takes ongoing poison damage and has disadvantage on Agility checks.

name: Burn
description: A cheap, highly addictive narcotic prevalent among Low Colors; induces a warm, numbing euphoria.
mechanics: Grants temporary resistance to pain but causes addiction and long-term stat degradation.

name: Stims
description: Military-grade combat stimulants used by Grays and Golds to push past physical limits.
mechanics: Grants an extra action for 3 turns, followed by a severe crash (exhaustion).

name: Slicing Deck
description: A high-end, custom-built cybernetic interface terminal used by Green slicers to breach Society networks.
mechanics: Grants +3 to hacking/slicing attempts. Can be traced if a critical failure occurs.

name: GhostCloak Implant
description: An illegal, under-the-skin mesh that masks thermal and electromagnetic output from standard sensors.
mechanics: Allows the user to bypass automated security scanners. Highly illegal for non-Golds.

name: PulseFist
description: A heavy gauntlet that releases a localized kinetic shockwave upon impact; favored by Obsidian enforcers.
mechanics: Deals heavy blunt damage and knocks targets prone.

name: Razor
description: The poly-metal blade of a Gold; shifts from a liquid whip to a rigid sword via an impulse ring.
mechanics: Ignores standard armor in sword form; can grapple or slice multiple targets in whip form.

name: SlingBand
description: A subtle, high-tension wire weapon worn around the wrist, used for garroting or silent ranged attacks.
mechanics: Requires a stealth check to use effectively. High critical damage.

name: FrySuit
description: A hazardous-environment suit worn by Reds to survive the extreme temperatures of deep core mining.
mechanics: Grants immunity to extreme heat and radiation, but movement is halved.

name: Datadrop Chip
description: A tiny, disposable data storage device designed to dissolve into dust once read or if tampered with.
mechanics: Safely stores sensitive intel. Erases itself upon failed decryption.

name: EMP Pulse Grenade
description: Standard issue for breaching operations; fries unshielded electronics within a small radius.
mechanics: Disables optics, unshielded weapons, and comms in a 10m radius for 1d4 turns.

name: Neural Spike
description: A brutal interrogation implant that interfaces directly with the pain centers of the brain.
mechanics: Grants advantage on Intimidation checks against the implanted target.

name: Ion Burner
description: An illegal engine modification used by smugglers to achieve rapid, short-burst acceleration.
mechanics: Increases ship speed drastically for one turn but risks engine blowout.

name: Scorch Rifle
description: A heavy directed-energy weapon used by Gray legionnaires; fires a beam of superheated plasma.
mechanics: Deals high fire/energy damage. Overheats if fired continuously.

name: VoidSuit
description: Standard zero-g operational suit with magnetic boots and limited thruster capabilities.
mechanics: Allows survival in vacuum for up to 12 hours. Clunky in gravity.

name: TruthVine Extract
description: A potent truth serum used by Society inquisitors; breaks down mental barriers and induces compliance.
mechanics: Target must pass a Willpower save or be compelled to answer questions truthfully for 1 hour.

name: Kinetic Grapple
description: A wrist-mounted device that fires a magnetic tether; used for zero-g traversal or pulling small objects.
mechanics: Range of 30m. Can support the weight of two armored individuals.

name: Pink's Kiss
description: A slow-acting, odorless poison often applied to lips or drinks; causes cardiac arrest mimicking natural causes.
mechanics: Takes 24 hours to take effect. Extremely difficult to detect in autopsy.

name: DataSiphon Implant
description: A covert, fingertip-mounted jack allowing a Green to download data via physical touch to a terminal.
mechanics: Allows hands-free slicing. Leaves a microscopic physical trace.

name: Sunburst Cannon
description: A devastating orbital weapon that fires a concentrated beam of solar energy; mounted only on heavy dreadnoughts.
mechanics: Deals catastrophic damage to planetary shields and infrastructure.

name: Obsidian War-Scythe
description: A massive, two-handed polearm with a monomolecular edge, designed to cleave through Starshells.
mechanics: Requires immense strength (Obsidian/Gold) to wield. High armor penetration.

name: FlashBang
description: A non-lethal grenade that emits a blinding flash and deafening sound, used for crowd control.
mechanics: Targets in a 15m radius must pass a physical save or be blinded/deafened for 2 turns.

name: Grav-Boots
description: Footwear equipped with anti-gravity generators, allowing the user to walk on walls, ceilings, or hover.
mechanics: Requires a power source. Grants extreme mobility in combat.

name: Holo-Shroud
description: A small, belt-mounted projector that creates a localized holographic disguise over the user.
mechanics: Grants a major bonus to disguise checks, but glitches if the user takes damage.

name: Mag-Lock Breaker
description: A specialized tool used by thieves to bypass electronic magnetic locks via a rapid brute-force algorithm.
mechanics: Opens standard electronic locks in 1d4 turns. Illegal to possess.

name: Somnus Dart
description: A quiet, compressed-air projectile tipped with a powerful sleep agent; favored by covert operatives.
mechanics: Target must pass an Endurance save or instantly fall asleep for 1d4 hours.

name: Orbital Drop Pod
description: A heavily armored, heavily shielded single-occupant pod designed for planetary invasion from orbit.
mechanics: Survives atmospheric entry and anti-air fire. One-way trip.

name: Helium-3 Siphon
description: A complex array of tubes and pumps used to extract raw helium-3 from Martian gas pockets.
mechanics: Essential for energy production. Highly volatile if damaged during extraction.

name: Cybernetic Eye
description: A prosthetic eye that offers enhanced vision modes (thermal, night vision) and built-in crosshairs.
mechanics: Grants bonuses to ranged attacks and perception checks in low light.

name: Jackal's Tooth
description: A small, easily concealed ceramic blade that cannot be detected by standard metal scanners.
mechanics: Deals low damage but is completely invisible to security checks.

name: Ion-Shatter Mine
description: A deployed space mine that releases a massive EMP blast, designed to disable pursuing ships.
mechanics: Disables electronics and shields of ships caught in the blast radius.

name: Whisper Comm
description: A sub-vocal communication device implanted in the jawbone; allows silent transmission to paired users.
mechanics: Enables silent, untraceable team communication over short distances.

name: Copper Bureaucracy Pad
description: A specialized datapad filled with Society legal codes, override protocols, and administrative access keys.
mechanics: Grants advantage on bureaucratic navigation and localized system overrides.

name: Blood-Clotter Auto-Injector
description: A standard issue medical device for the legions; instantly injects a coagulant to stop severe bleeding.
mechanics: Automatically stabilizes a dying character and restores 1 HP.
